Johnnie Peters
30m
Doc Dougherty planogram is the layout of what products go in what rows in your machine, so essentially a product layout. Go look up Anthony’s post from late last week where he gives an example of one of his planograms.

Here’s one I use: Hi Sarah, I’m Manuelle Duvall, owner of MKD Vending, serving the Washington, D.C.  …more
MKD luxury Amenities - MKD luxury Amenities
People want convenience for everyday necessities. In the current environment, your residents would have to go to a market or pharmacy to get basic necessities, wait in long lines, which in many cases will require a car and gas. A key amenity that is missing from the equation is a un-unattended smart micro market.
